name: Tighten bot message copy + spec command descriptions
description: Drop filler words (Vui lòng, Rất tiếc, tính năng, sử dụng, quản lý) from all bot user-facing messages and rewrite spec Command Set descriptions to be terse. No behavior change.

planned: Inline plan: 11 source files + 1 spec + 1 test + harness. Copy-only rewrite, no logic change.
done: start.ts: unlinked greeting drops 'Vui lòng'; linked greeting shortened to one-liner.
help.ts: footer command list removed; bullets tightened.
settings.ts: 4 messages shortened (unlinked /settings, unlinked toggle, linked header, not found).
stats.ts / budget.ts / top.ts: unlinked guidance shortened.
ai-expense.ts: 6 messages shortened (unlinked, empty, no-config, AI error, no-items, invalid, multi-note). 'không khả dụng' substring preserved for test.
confirm-expense.ts: 7 messages shortened (unlinked, not found, expired, already confirmed x2, race, invalid preview, no permission, retry).
spec: Command Set table rewritten to 8-word max; Auto-detect subsection collapsed to 1 sentence; Main Menu tip updated.
test ai-expense.spec.ts: 4 assertion strings updated to match new copy.
verification: ./init.sh test -> OK (641+ tests pass, 4 assertion strings updated).

notes: Copy-only. No behavior change. All test assertions updated to match new shorter copy.
